race.comment: Onto our feature, the Mildura Cup and the class runner is RUN HARRY RUN (1) who resumes here. He's been scratched from a couple of races but looks well placed here. First up last campaign he won the Ararat Bowl under 61kg before being highly competitive in some good races. He should get a lovely run here and take beating. FINE FUTURE (4) is going very well. He charged home to just miss in the Swan Hill Cup two back and was rock solid again in the Winter Final at Flemington latest which is good form for this. Little niggle back to 1400m but he'll be very hard to hold out. BLACK STORM (7) comes back in trip having just battled last start over 1700m. The Swan Hill Cup run prior says he's right in the mix up on speed. FLYING VALLEY (9) won an easier race fresh but drops 6.5kg off that and could measure up. HARMONIOUS SENORA (6) is off an injury-enforced spell but did win this last year and was first up there so must be included.
